features: 🌊【Safe Material】 The Pool Float Hammock 2 pack is made of high-quality PVC, safe and environmentally friendly, strong and thick, and covered with a soft and comfortable mesh cloth, which brings great comfort to your skin. description: The holidays are here, are you planning to travel with your family and friends? Are you looking for a goods that allows you to enjoy the cold water to the full? Why don't you have our Pool Float Hammock 2 pack if you want to have fun at the beach? A 4-in-1 hot tub inflatable hammock allows you to float on the water, enjoy the sun, and feel the cool world. Even if you can't swim, you can play in the water as much as you want. Why Choose our float lounger？ 💥Lightweight and Anti-Leakage: The Pool Float Hammock 2 pack made of high-quality PVC adhesive fabric, which is durable and soft. It is tasteless, non-toxic, safe and durable. The high-blocking leak-proof design ensures the safety and continuity of water activities. 💥PVC mesh design: The soft and comfortable mesh allows your skin to be in close contact with the pool water, feel the coolness of summer, and enjoy a lazy and relaxing day in the water. 💥Excellent buoyancy: The two large buoyancy pillows of this water hammock provide excellent balance and buoyancy. The ergonomic seat is used to provide you with great comfort and a strong load-bearing capacity of up to 250 pounds. 💥Summer essentials: A hot tub inflatable hammock is not only a inflatable hammock, it can also be used as a lounge chair, sports saddle, or even a rafting bed. You can freely change your postures such as sleeping, reading, and basking, which will bring you endless fun and let you forget your worries!
